intent_precise:
ThermoFisher MagMAX Plant DNA Isolation: Using plate (deep_well_plate, slot 6), reagents (reservoir, slot 3), mag_plate (deep_well_plate, slot deepwell plate), temp_plate (deep_well_plate, slot 6). With magnetic module, Temperature Module Gen2 module. (1) Disengage magnets to release beads. (2) Pause: Please refill tipracks before resuming. (3) Set temperature to 65°C. (4) Pause: Homogenize samples, then return plate tempdeck on robot. (5) Incubate for 10 minutes. (6) Transfer 200µL from source A1 to destination A1. (7) Pause: Incubate on ice for 5 minutes, then return plate to deck.
            Replace lysis buffer A with wash buffer 1. (8) Engage magnets for bead separation. (9) Incubate for 5 minutes. (10) Disengage magnets to release beads. (11) Pause: Vortex plate for 1 minute at 750 RPM,
         then replace onto magdeck. Replace ethanol with wash buffer 2. (12) Engage magnets for bead separation. (13) Incubate for 2 minutes. (14) Disengage magnets to release beads. (15) Engage magnets for bead separation. (16) Incubate for 2 minutes. (17) Incubate for 5 minutes. (18) Disengage magnets to release beads. (19) Set temperature to 70°C. (20) Pause: Vortex plate, then return to tempdeck on robot (21) Incubate for 5 minutes. (22) Pause: Return plate to magdeck. Replace original
             plate at position 6 with a new skirted plate (23) Engage magnets for bead separation. (24) Incubate for 5 minutes.
intent_concise: Perform magnetic bead separation, temperature control (65°C, 70°C). (using 200µL, ~34 min total)
intent: For the ThermoFisher MagMAX Plant DNA Isolation protocol, start by setting up your deep well plates in slot 6, reagent reservoir in slot 3, and mag plate on the magnetic module with the Temperature Module Gen2. Begin by disengaging the magnets to release beads, then make sure to refill your tipracks before continuing. Heat the temperature module to 65°C, homogenize your samples manually and return the plate to the robot for a 10-minute incubation, then transfer 200µL from source A1 to destination A1. You'll need to incubate the plate on ice for 5 minutes off-deck, then proceed through several magnetic separation cycles - engaging magnets for 5 minutes, disengaging, vortexing at 750 RPM for 1 minute, and repeating with 2-minute magnetic separations while swapping buffers (replace lysis buffer A with wash buffer 1, then ethanol with wash buffer 2). Finally, heat to 70°C, vortex and incubate for 5 minutes, then do a final magnetic separation for 5 minutes after replacing the original plate with a fresh skirted plate.

commands.message: Homogenize samples, then return plate tempdeck on robot.

Incubate on ice for 5 minutes, then return plate to deck.
            Replace lysis buffer A with wash buffer 1.

Vortex plate for 1 minute at 750 RPM,
         then replace onto magdeck. Replace ethanol with wash buffer 2.
Vortex plate, then return to tempdeck on robot

Return plate to magdeck. Replace original
             plate at position 6 with a new skirted plate
